examples: I like to roam around the fields.
Barn eggs, sometimes called Percher, are laid by hens that have the freedom to roam a henhouse.
Herds of elk, deer, and pronghorn antelope roam the grasslands, where visitors can camp, hike, and bike.
Zebras, rhinos and elephants roam the fields, while big cats nervously pace back and forth in cages.
No wonder it is one of the few areas left in Nepal where snow leopards still roam undisturbed.
